codeReview.summary: Fix commit e47de12 resolves the prior blocking issue by making HeuristicAgent.act() inspect obs.active_alerts first and map alert text to the required remediation actions before incident fallback. Added tests cover bad_config rollback, memory/high_memory restart, timeout/latency restart with cascade root-cause targeting, high_cpu scale-up, alert priority, status-only fallthrough, and integration scenarios. No regressions were identified in the reviewed fix scope.

summary: Reviewed prior failure context plus fix feature evidence (handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff). The fix fully addresses the original blocking requirement gap and introduces no new blocking or non-blocking issues in the reviewed changes.
